verses.text: Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa in Stefen kiangah, “Tu-a amaute' gen bang takpi mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin
Stefen in, “Ute pate aw, ka thugen hong ngai un. I pupi Abraham, Haran khua-ah a ten'ma, Mesopotamia gamah a om lai-in, ama kiangah a minthang Pasian kilang a
‘Na gam na lei, na beh na phungte kiang panin paikhia in la, nangma tungah kong lahding gamah pai in,’ ci hi
Amah zong Khaldea gam panin paikhia-in Haran khua-ah teng hi. A pa a sih khit ciangin Pasian in tu-a na ten'na uh hih gamah amah na lalsak leuleu hi

Pasian in Abraham tungah ama aituam dingin leitang khutpeek cia nangawn pialo napi-in, amah leh a suan a khakte tungah hih gam a piakna ding thu a ciam hi. Pasian in tua thuciamna a piak laitakin Abraham in ta nei nailo hi
Tua bang hinapi-in, Pasian in Abraham kiangah, ‘Na suan na khakte gamdangah tengin salin om ding uh a, kum za li sung nakpi takin gimna thuak ding uh hi
Ahi zongin sila-in a nei gam mite tungah thu ka khen ding a, na suan na khakte tua gam panin paikhia-in hih lai gamah kei hong bia ding uh hi,’ ci hi

Tua ciangin Pasian in Abraham tungah kiciamna limin vun-atna ngeina na pia hi. Tua ahih manin Abraham in a tapa Isaac a suahzawh nipikal khat khit ciangin a vun at a, Isaac in a tapa Jakob' vun at leuleu a, Jakob in eite' pupite ahi a tapa sawmlenihte' vun na at leuleu hi
“I pupi dangte in Josef na haza uh a, mi tungah na zuakin, a leite in Egypt gamah sal dingin a na zuaksawn uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in i pupi Josef na huh a

a thuakna khempeuh panin na honkhia hi. Egypt kumpipa Faro' mai-ah Josef a tun' ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pilna leh a deihhuai gamtat hoih na guan' hi. Tua ahih manin Faro in ama khutnuai-ah a gam a uksawn ding leh a kumpi innsung khempeuh a van dingin a koih hi
Tua ciangin Egypt gam leh Kanaan gam khempeuhah kialpi tung a, mi khempeuh in haksatna thuak uh ahih manin i pupite in zong annek ding muzo nawnlo uh hi
Tua ahih manin Egypt gamah an om hi, ci-in Jakob in thu a zak ciangin i pupite ahi a tapate a khatveina na na paisak hi
A nihveina a pai uh ciangin a sanggamte tungah i pupi Josef na kipulak a, tua huna kipanin Faro in zong Josef innkuansung thu na thei hi
Tua ciangin Josef in a pa Jakob kiangah mi sawl a, amah-a kipan a innkuan mi khempeuh Egypt-ah a paina dingun a gensak hi. Tua hun laitakin Jakob innkuan mi sawmsagih leh nga pha uh hi
Tua ahih manin Jakob zong Egypt gamah pai a, amah-a kipan i pupite khempeuh tua gamah a si uh hi
Amau' luanghawmte, Shekhem khua-ah kipua a, Abraham in Hamor-te beh tung panin han dingin sum tawh a lei leitangah kiphum hi
“Pasian in Abraham tungah a thuciamna a tun'sak ding a nai kuan ciangin Egypt gamah ei mite tampi tak na pha ta uh hi
A tawpna-ah Josef a theilo kumpi dang khat, Egypt gamsung a uk dingin hong kipan hi
I mipihte na khemgawpin na khelbawl a, a ta ngekte uh a sihna dingin inn panin mun dangah a koihkhia sak hi
Hih hunin naungek melhoih mahmah khat na suak hi. Inn-ah kha thum sung kikem a
inn panin a kikoihkhiat ciangin Faro' tanu in a ta dingin la a, ama tapa bang teekteek mahin bawlin a khan'suah hi
Egypt gamsunga pilna om khempeuh ama tungah kihilh a, thugenna leh nasepna-ah milian mahmah khat a suak hi
“Amah kum sawmli a phak ciangin Israel' suan a mipihte lakah painopna lungsim a nei hi
Tua bangin a mipihte lakah a va pai ciangin Egypt mite khat in a Israel mipihte khat a bawlsiatna mu a, a mipihpa a hutna-in Egypt mipa a satlum hi
Amah pen eite hong honkhia dingin Pasian in a zatding mipa hi, ci-in a mipihte in a thei ding sa a, ahi zongin a mipihte in na theilo uh hi
A zing ciangin Israel mi nih a kilai mu leuleu a, amaute a phelh dingin kipanin, ‘Lawmte aw, minam khat hilo na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin khatlekhat tuaci kibawl na hi uh hiam?’ ci hi
A lawmpa a bawlsiapa in Moses sawnkhia-in, ‘Kote a hong uk ding leh thu a hong khen dingin kua in nang hong koih ahi hiam
Zan-a Egypt mipa na thah bangin kei zong a hong thatnuam na hi hiam?’ a na ci hi
Moses in hih thu a zak ciangin Egypt gam panin taikhia-in Midian gamah ten' ding kipan a, tua gamah tapa nih a nei hi
“Tua gamah kum sawmli a ten' khit ciangin, Sinai Mual tung gamlakah sawlpang laka meikuang sungah vantung mi khat ama kiangah hong kilang hi
Moses in a muh ciangin lamdangsa a, a nai takin a muhtheihna dingin sawlpang kuang kiangah a va pai hi. Ahi zongin Topa' awging za a
‘Kei pen na pu na pate uh ahi Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob-te' Pasian ka hi hi,’ a na ci hi. Moses zong lau-in linggawp a, en ngamlo hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, ‘Na din'na mun pen a siangtho leitang ahih manin na khedap suah in

Ka mite in Egypt gamah bawlsiatna a thuaknate teltakin ka mukhin hi. Amaute' tauna awging ka za a, amaute a honkhia dingin a hong paisuk ka hi hi. Hih lai-ah hong pai in; Egypt gamah nang ka hong paisak ding hi,’ na ci hi

“Moses pen Israel mite in deihloin, ‘Kote a hong uk ding leh thu a hong khen dingin kua in hong koih ahi hiam?’ a cihpa uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin Moses pen sawlpang kuang sung pan ama kiangah a kilang vantung mi' huhna tawh ukpa leh honkhiapa ahi dingin Pasian in a sawlpa ahi hi
Amah in Egypt gam leh San Tuipi-ah lim leh na lamdangte bawlin, Egypt gam panin Israel mite paikhiatpih a, gamlakah kum sawmli sung amaute a makaih hi
Hih Moses pen Israel mite tungah, ‘Pasian in kei hong sawl mah bangin, i mipihte sung mah panin note-a' ding kamsang khat hong sawl ding hi,’ a cipa ahi hi

Amah pen Israel mite tawh gamlakah a ompa hi a, Sinai Mual tunga ama kiangah thu a gen vantung mi leh i pute tawh a kikhawlpa ahi hi. Eite tungah hong gensawn dingin Pasian kiang panin a tul ngeilo thu a ngah ahi hi
“Ahi zongin i pute in ama thu na mang nuamloin, amah na nawlkhin uh a, Egypt gamah ciahkik nopna lungsim na nei uh hi

Tua ahih manin amaute in Aaron kiangah, ‘Egypt gam panin eite a hong paikhiatpih tua Moses tungah bang thu piang hiam cih theilo ihih manin, eite' mai-ah i paisak ding milim pasian pawlkhat hong bawlsak in,’ ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin amaute in bawngno tawh a kibang lim khat bawl uh a, ganhing tawh tua milim bia-in, amaute' bawltawm pasian hangin lungdamin pawi a na bawl uh hi

Tua ahih manin kamsangte laibu sungah, ‘Israel mite aw, gamlakah kum sawmli sung, gan go-in biakna na piakte uh kei tunga nong piak uh hilo hi. Note in na puak uh puanbuk pen Molok pasian milim puanbuk leh note' aksi pasian Refan' puanbuk ahi hi. Tuate pen na biak dingun note' bawltawm milim ahih manin Babylon khuapi khen pekah salin ka hong paisak ding hi,’ ci-in a kigelh mah bangin Pasian in amaute nungngat a, vana om aksite a bia dingin amaute a sawlkhia hi
“Gamlakah a omlai-un i pute in Pasian' ompihna puanbuk nei uh a, Pasian in Moses tungah a gensa, a lim ding a lahsa bang teekteekin a kibawl ahi hi

Tua khit ciangin i pute in amau' pate tung panin a ngah uh tua puanbuk pen amau' ten'na ding gam a la dingin a kuan uh ciangin na pua uh a, Pasian in amaute' mai-ah tua gam mite hawlkhiatsak ahih manin tua gam a luah uh ciangin a puanbuk zong a na tun'pih uh hi. Tua ahih manin David' hun ciangdong tua puanbuk na om hi
David in Pasian' maipha ngah ahih manin, Jakob Pasian-a' dingin biakinn khat a vaihawm sakna dingin Pasian kiangah a ngen hi
Ahi zongin Pasian-a' dingin biakinn a lamsak pen David hiloin a tapa Solomon ahi hi

Ahi zongin kamsangpa in, ‘Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Vantung pen keima tokhom hi a, leitung zong ka khe ngakna mun ahi hi. Kei-a' ding bang biakinn hong lamsak thei ding a, ka omna ding koi lai mun hi thei ding ahi hiam? Hih nate khempeuh keima bawlsa hilo ahi hiam, ci hi,’ ci-in a gen mah bangin mihingte' lamsa innsungah a Lianpen Pasian a teng hilo hi
“Na lungsim uh khauh mahmah a, lawki lungsim paii-in, Pasian' thu-ah bilngong na bang uh hi. I pu i pate mah bangin Kha Siangtho thu na mang nuam kei uh hi

I pu i pate in kamsang a bawlsiatloh khat beek omlo hi. Pasian' deihna bangin a gamta a Nasempa a hong paina ding thu a genkhol Pasian' kamtaite na that uh a, tu-in note in tua nasempa lehhekin na that leuleu uh hi
Note in vantung mi tung tawnin Pasian' hong piak thukham ngah napi-in na mang nuam kei uh hi,” a ci hi.
A kikhawm uliante in Stefen' thugen a zak uh ciangin nakpi takin heh uh a, a ha uh gawisan uh hi
Ahi zongin Stefen ahih leh Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin vantung lam ento a, Pasian' minthan'na vang leh Pasian' taklamah Jesuh a ding mu ahih manin
“En un! Vantung kihong a, Pasian' taklamah Mihing Tapa a ding ka mu hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin amaute in a bil uh humsanin nakpi takin kiko-in Stefen bawhhuan uh a
khua pualamah kaikhia-in suang golpipi a khiat uh hi. Hih thu-ah teci pangin Stefen a deng mite in a puantungsilh uh suahin Saul a kici tangval khat kiangah lawnin a kemsak uh hi
Tua bangin suang a khiat thuahthuah laitakun Stefen in thu ngen a, “Topa Jesuh aw, ka kha hong la in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah kunin nakpi takin kiko a, “Topa aw, hih mite' mawhna na maisak in,” a cih khit ciangin a si ta hi.
